first_run.rationale: The scores are identical, and the reasoning across both evaluations is substantively the same. The strengths and concerns highlighted are identical, with only minor wording changes that fall within the scope of normal run-to-run variation. The change in location from Berlin to Bucharest did not introduce any new concerns, change the assessment of skills, or negatively impact the overall evaluation.
